task_completion.description: DreamPlan Home Design Software is open with the sample house project loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software window is visible, displaying a 3D or 2D view of a house (the sample project).

task_completion.description: The Roof or Accessories menu/tool is selected in the software interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user interface shows the Roof tab or Accessories section active, with options related to chimneys or roof additions visible.

task_completion.description: A chimney object is visible in the design view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chimney structure is clearly visible in the 3D or 2D view of the house.

task_completion.description: The chimney is correctly positioned on the main roof slope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chimney is attached to the sloped main roof of the house, not floating in the sky or placed on the ground/grass.

task_completion.description: The chimney has a brick texture or style applied to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The surface of the chimney clearly shows a red or brown brick pattern/texture.

task_completion.description: The project is saved after the chimney is installed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The File menu is open with 'Save Project' highlighted/clicked, a save dialog box is visible, or a save confirmation is shown.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DreamPlan GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, menu navigation, and tool usage within the DreamPlan interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to DreamPlan, with its characteristic toolbars, tabs, and 3D rendering engine, not a generic image editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simulate completion by typing the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors or search bars containing the task description or expected answers used to fake progress.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment uses NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software. The sample project loaded is 'Contemporary House'. The task requires placing a chimney on the main roof slope of the house. The chimney must have a brick material/texture, which is a supported exterior material in DreamPlan. The chimney must be attached to the roof and should not be floating in the sky or placed on the grass.
